misconceptions.claim: Elliptic-curve addition is ordinary coordinate-wise addition.
misconceptions.why_tempting: The objects are points with x and y coordinates.

misconceptions.claim: The real curve picture is the cryptographic curve.
misconceptions.why_tempting: The chord-and-tangent drawing is vivid and continuous.

misconceptions.claim: Scalar multiplication is repeated multiplication of coordinates.
misconceptions.why_tempting: The word multiplication appears in scalar multiplication.

dumb_questions: Where is the identity element on a curve?
Why does a line give a group operation?
Why do finite-field points still form a group when the smooth picture disappears?
bad_intuitions_to_kill: The real drawing is more than intuition.
